Abo Shaar Brothers “Royal Tex”

General Information
Started Year 1963
Factory Size 1.200m²
Chairman Mr. Saied Sohil Arabi Abo Shaar
Export Manager Mr. Maged Zakaria Saeed
Production Information
Production Process Knitting, Cutting, Printing, and Sewing
Products Range Polo Shirts, Underwear, Shorts , and T – shirts
Products Categories Women and Men wear
Production Capacity 3, 000 Pcs / Day
Minimum Order 360 Pcs / Style – 120 Pcs / Color
Lead Time 15 (Day)
Terms of Sales CIF
Number of Employees 120
Market USA, and Europe
Certificates ISO – OHSAS
Contacts
Address 1 Mahmoud Sadek St., Al – Ameriya – Cairo – Egypt
Telephone (+202) 25937958 – 25880222
Fax (+202) 24522101 – 25937958
Email [email protected], [email protected]
